scripts.build: pnpm run build:cli && pnpm run build:gui && pnpm run artifacts
scripts.build:gui: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('target/release/dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tauri build
scripts.test:gui: node --experimental-strip-types --test src/views/accounts-usage.test.ts src/views/dashboard-connection.test.ts src/views/logs.test.ts src/theme.test.ts && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.clean: node -e "const { rmSync } = require('node:fs'); for (const p of ['dist', 'release']) rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true });" && cargo clean
